title: The Great Biopic Whitewash
description: Biographer Yasser Usman, author of Guru Dutt: An Unfinished Story, Rajesh Khanna: The Untold Story of India’s First Superstar, Sanjay Dutt: The Crazy Untold Story of Bollywood’s Bad Boy and Rekha: The Untold Story, says honest biopics are becoming increasingly rare.
